IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (26801767.pdf)
SUMMARY: Results-driven IT director with over 30 years of experience in diverse industries, including Port and Higher Education. Expertise includes team leadership, technical architecture, training and development, disaster recovery planning, and information protection analysis.

JOB TITLE: Director, Information Technology
COMPANY: Company Name

DESCRIPTION: ['Manages IT computer center for the Board of Commissioners of the Port of New Orleans', 'Develops and implements procedures for system improvement', 'Makes recommendations on equipment acquisition and data processing programs', 'Provides management with information on system applications', 'Develops and revises data practices', 'Formulates requests for bids and proposals', 'Supervises IT staff', 'Provides consulting services to Port departments', 'Evaluates existing manual and automated activities', 'Represents the Board in committees', 'Prepares hardware, software, and personnel budgets', 'Participates in strategic planning']
